programme.desc: When her three grown-up children fail to answer her call for a family gathering, exacerbated mother Shirley calls on outspoken force of nature Madea to see that everyone comes together to discuss some rather important issues.

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea and her friends are asked to watch her great-niece on Halloween. As the night goes on they are plagued by supernatural events. Madea has to keep the teens out of trouble while fending off a number of paranormal threats like ghosts and zombies.

programme.title: Food Paradise: All You Can Meat
programme.desc: These places dish up all the meat you can eat, from a bottomless buffet of skewered meats in NYC to mile-high meaty sandwiches in Colorado.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Ordering All Kinds of Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cooks takeout with four DDD alums via video chat. There's real deal Italian from Scottsdale, AZ, American Indian fare from Denver, gourmet grub out of a Massachusetts lounge and short ribs all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brunch, Bologna and Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing everything from brunch to burgers! In Louisville, Ky., a breakfast-lunch spot crankin' out southern comfort, like lamb grits and fried bologna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Food With Attitude
programme.desc: Guy heads to California to a diner for a delicious meatloaf and a chilli parlour in Ohio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pork To Pasta
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into everything from pork to pasta on this trip. In Chicago, a real-deal Italian spot with righteous ravioli and dynamite deep dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Atlantic to Pacific
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a far-out taste of both coasts. In Bakersfield, Calif., a 75-year-old steakhouse fires up savoury stuffed pork chops and legit lobster mac 'n' cheese. Across town, a Latin-American fusion joint cranks out chicken and tri-tip.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soups and Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy is on the search the best comfort foods, such as a bacon blue cheeseburger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Finger Lickin' Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is eating up grub that doesn't require a knife and fork! In Atlanta, a funky old house turned brew pub cookin' up cheddarwurst corn dogs along with a knockout pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Poutine, Pizza and Pork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri travels the country diving into some meaty masterpieces starting at a spot in Longmont, Colorado, that serves craft beer and primo pub grub like their piled-high poutine burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Breakfast
programme.desc: Guy searches out some of America's greatest breakfasts. He indulges in a variety of pancakes, hash as well as omelettes.

programme.title: Giada in Italy: Tuscan Lunch: An Affair of the Heart

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Your Sweet Tooth
programme.desc: Bobby Flay and guest Sunny Anderson tackle the sweet side of brunch with creme brulee French toast with drunken strawberries, Sunny's sambal and pineapple glazed bacon, blueberry pancake bites and sparkling iced espresso.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Liquor Store Secrets
programme.desc: Ina's unlocking her liquor store secrets and easy techniques that take red wine-braised short ribs, fennel soup gratin and an awesome fresh apple spice cake to the next level.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Ante Up
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli loves a competitive game night at home, and this time she's going all out by matching her menu to the games for her husband, Tom, and their friends.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Spook-tacular Sweets
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a spine-tingling lineup of Halloween treats with the help of her kid crew.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a half-empty nest while her daughters are off at college, but she still needs good, hearty food at her fingertips for her hungry teenage sons. So she's cooking up dishes that she can serve half now and freeze the rest for another time.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kansas Cookin'
programme.desc: Ree creates awesome breakfast burritos packed with spicy egg-and-meat scramble.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: The Italian Grill
programme.desc: Molly Yeh hosts a double-date pizza party on the farm and takes the Italian grilling outside for some extra fun times. She makes cheesy fried risotto balls, grilled zucchini pizza with basil mint pesto and a crisp romaine salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Guilty Brunch
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood gets her squad together on a lazy Saturday for the best meal of any weekend; brunch!

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cocktails and Cookies
programme.desc: Ina asks her Hollywood friends over for breakfast ricotta with berries and maple syrup. Then, Ina shows the guys how to bake whole wheat and peanut butter dog biscuits.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Beefed Up
programme.desc: Ina Garten is setting her sights on beef and sharing her tips for preparing it roasted, ground, sliced, sauteed and seared just like a pro. She starts with the perfect steak, an easy and elegant filet mignon with mustard and mushrooms.

programme.title: The Kitchen: 'Sweater Weather' Weeknight Warrior
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian shows how simple lamb can be for a weeknight meal with his harissa and fennel marinated lamb chops with tapenade.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Winner, Winner, Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Guy asks the chefs to give Ps a chance, since all the ingredients in their first dishes must start with that letter. Next, they must make a winner of a chicken dinner using a Grocery List that includes Asian hot pepper paste and candy.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Flavortown Throwdown
programme.desc: The four chefs ready to throwdown in Flavortown must first create a hearty lunch with a 5-pound weight restriction. Next, the chefs must make an innovative dinner incorporating Guy Fieri's crazy grocery list.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Kitchen Heroes
programme.desc: Charity is important at Flavortown Market, where most of the unused food is donated to local food shelters after each competition. With that in mind, Guy Fieri decides to showcase chefs who are giving back to their own communities every day.

programme.desc: Alan's girlfriend insists he confess his true identity to Larry, and Walden goes on a road trip with Jenny and Barry.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Answer Is Maybe

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Come to Papa Jeff

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Oh God, Yes

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Barb moves in with Christine after announcing that she and Pete plan to divorce. Meanwhile, when Barb moves in, Matthew relocates to Ritchie's room where he discovers his nephew's strange sleep habits.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Champ
programme.desc: When 'meanie moms' Marly and Lindsay guilt Christine into serving hot lunch at Ritchie's school, she finds herself serving with Stan and vows not to sleep with him again. Meanwhile, she and Matthew decide they must take control of their dating lives.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Playdate With Destiny
programme.desc: Christine's crush on Mr. Harris makes her lose her composure around him at Ritchie's school's fundraising gala. When Ritchie wins the raffle prize of a playdate with him, Christine is thrilled, until Richard's father-son plans threaten to spoil the fun.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Women 'N Tuition
programme.desc: Christine tries to make some sacrifices in order to pay for Ritchie's rising school tuition. Meanwhile, Matthew realizes he hasn't been living up to his potential and considers some extreme changes.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Annoyed that Ritchie finds his weekends with his dad more fun than his weekdays with her, Christine decides to make Richard responsible for having Ritchie complete his big homework assignment.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: What About Barb?
programme.desc: When Barb starts working at Christine's gym, which she recently bought into, Christine can't accept the reality of not being in complete control. Meanwhile, Matthew helps Ritchie find the perfect nanny to replace him when he starts medical school.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Crash
programme.desc: When Christine's environmentally friendly hybrid car and Marly's gas-guzzling monster SUV hit one another, it becomes a bigger dispute than simply who hit whom. While her car is in the shop, Christine has to rent an SUV when no other car is available.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Scores
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly signs up Ritchie for soccer after Mr. Harris informs her and Richard that he's had trouble making friends. Christine claims not to believe in competitive sports but finds herself in competition with Richard for Mr. Harris' attention.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: Blanche is exposed in the newspaper entering the home of a local married politician.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Blanche makes a move at Ted, Stan's brother, the minute she learns he's a neurosurgeon. She is furious when she discovers the only woman Ted is apparently interested in is Dorothy. Meanwhile, Rose is suffering from insomnia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus

programme.desc: Dr. Jeff races to save a brave pit bull shot defending her owner during a robbery. Dr. Baier treats a guinea pig with an unusual problem. And Jeff and Hector head out to a wildlife sanctuary that needs their help with a couple of wolves.

programme.desc: When a family's beloved dog is hit by a car, Dr. Jeff races to save him. Dr Amy treats a cherished Yorkie with a mysterious wound. Then, when a cat begins losing weight, Dr. Baier must find out why.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Mission in South Dakota
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team lend a hand at Lakota Reservation in South Dakota. Back at the clinic, Amy debates emergency surgery for a French bulldog who ate his favorite toy, while Susan finds the perfect forever home for a lovable canine called Koda.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Petra's Pigs
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff reveals the cause behind a beloved senior dog's mysterious lump. A cat called Tigger is monitored for unusual eating habits. An owner learns the perils of purchasing her pup online after it becomes sickly, and Petra shows off her guinea pigs.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: What to Do When Expecting
programme.desc: A routine health check takes a frightening turn for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato. Keepers anxiously await to see if otter couple Odie and Paula are expecting, and a gorilla called Kanzi must prove she can receive vital medical care.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The New Otter Brood
programme.desc: After a long road, giant otter couple Icana and Tarubu welcome four pups and quickly discover the hardships of parenting. Red river hog Kya struggles to survive against her two sisters, and keepers become concerned for Donatello, a sickly Batagur turtle.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Petra's Pigs
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff reveals the cause behind a beloved senior dog's mysterious lump. A cat called Tigger is monitored for unusual eating habits. An owner learns the perils of purchasing her pup online after it becomes sickly, and Petra shows off her guinea pigs.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Saved by the Sky
programme.desc: A puppy with a broken leg is rescued from a kill shelter in Oklahoma and flown to Denver where Dr. Jeff gives her a second chance at life. A dog eats a box of toxic chocolates infused with marijuana and is rushed to the clinic for treatment.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: What to Do When Expecting
programme.desc: A routine health check takes a frightening turn for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato. Keepers anxiously await to see if otter couple Odie and Paula are expecting, and a gorilla called Kanzi must prove she can receive vital medical care.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Adventures of Porcupine Dating
programme.desc: Rhino Kifaru is attempting to mate, despite his arthritic knees; tapir Jenny falls ill, and widowed porcupine Roxy meets a new mate.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Full Heart
programme.desc: A devastated owner rushes his golden retriever into the clinic after accidentally breaking her leg while playing with her. Then, a beagle is dumped at the clinic after a vicious dog attack and it's up to Dr. Jeff to fix him up and find him a new home.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Miracle Cat
programme.desc: An overweight cat with kidney disease needs a miracle if it is going to survive. Dr. Jeff battles to save a dog hit by a car while the owners are on an overseas mission.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dead Moose Talking
programme.desc: The wardens wage a large-scale investigation into a moose that's been shot and left in the woods. A camouflaged ATV leads Warden Richardson to a convicted felon. Warden MacCabe runs across a hunter unlike any other.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dead Moose Talking
programme.desc: The wardens wage a large-scale investigation into a moose that's been shot and left in the woods. A camouflaged ATV leads Warden Richardson to a convicted felon. Warden MacCabe runs across a hunter unlike any other.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Squirrel Shakedown
programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mad About the Toy

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Way of the Dog
programme.desc: After the Simpsons' dog bites Marge, the family explores the tragic past of Santa's Little Helper.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Halloween of Horror
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes scared at the Krustyland Halloween Horror Night, Homer is forced to take down his Everscream Terrors decorations. Halloween pop-up employees seek vengeance on Homer for causing them to lose their jobs.

programme.title: Life: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: A journey into the uncharted corners of the ocean where the newest discoveries are being made and where the strangest sea creatures can be found.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted

programme.title: Life: Primates

programme.title: Life: Fish

programme.title: Life: Plants
programme.desc: Enter the world of plants as time-lapse technology makes this violent and self-seeking organism's behaviour a truly dynamic and surprisingly emotional experience.

programme.title: Life: Birds

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Ultimate Predators
programme.desc: The Apex predators sit high atop the food chain, these are the predators that even predators fear.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Predator Weapons
programme.desc: How predators have evolved specific weapons to make them efficient killing machines.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Predator Superpowers
programme.desc: Some creatures take everyday abilities to the extreme, to the detriment of their foes.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Animal Battles
programme.desc: The epic struggles that ensue when predators seek to make a meal of their prey.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Predator Paradise
programme.desc: Living in the world's most idyllic places is no holiday for many animals. This is fiercely contested real estate and the hunting grounds of some truly terrifying and deadly creatures.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: Born to Kill
programme.desc: Some baby predators must learn hunting from their parents, while others are deadly from the day they are born. Others deceive their prey or manipulate their brains. In a world where only the strong survive, these babies come out swinging.

programme.title: World's Deadliest: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Aquatic and terrestrial creatures meet and engage in combat at the disputed borders between land and water. Predators learn to hunt in different situations and prey watch for attacks from every direction.

programme.title: The Wild Atlantic: Eye of the Storm

programme.title: The Wild Atlantic: Fire From the Deep

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Witches of the Frozen North
programme.desc: A satellite passing over Canada reveals the startling anomaly of a giant pentagram etched deep into the snow, and investigators are led to uncover a tragic tale of sorcery, torture and the battle for control over the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant in the hidden churches of Ethiopia; A great white shark is attacked by a mystery undersea predator; Strange shapes on the Italian countryside might be ghostly remnants of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of King Arthur
programme.desc: Satellites spot a 2,000-year-old structure in Wales, that some suspect has a secret connection to King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant in the hidden churches of Ethiopia; A great white shark is attacked by a mystery undersea predator; Strange shapes on the Italian countryside might be ghostly remnants of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Mission Las Vegas
programme.desc: Brave lighting technicians battle extreme desert conditions to keep the lights bright in Las Vegas; they put their lives at stake to perform risky neon bulb replacements at terrifying heights and surrounded by hundreds of volts of electricity.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Storm Surge Emergency
programme.desc: When sea levels rise, storm surge barriers work overtime to fight off devastating floods. To get this tough job done, a team of experts maintain these engineering marvels to prevent catastrophe and keep millions of people safe.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Roller Coaster 911
programme.desc: When the world's oldest roller coaster breaks at the worst possible moment, skilled engineers and technicians race against the clock to investigate what went wrong and how to fix it before it's opened to the public.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: High-Wire Hell
programme.desc: Working thousands of feet above the California desert, brave engineers and fearless crews perform perilous high-wire acts to keep the hi-tech tramway system operating safely for the hundreds of daily tourists it transports.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Firefighting Water Bombs
programme.desc: Maintenance crews at a remote airstrip are exposed to the elements as they keep water-bombing aircraft flying to battle forest fires, and mechanics race against the clock to get transport helicopters to safely shuttle oil rig workers.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Tower of Terror
programme.desc: Fearless technicians battle staggering heights and fierce winds to upgrade a communications tower that keeps millions connected; special access to this dangerous job site reveals what it takes to get the job done.

programme.desc: Featured: wood utensils; refrigeration units; moccasins; electronic impact drills.

programme.title: How It's Made: Metal Detectors, Muffins, Tiffany Reproductions, Aircraft Engines
programme.desc: Take a look at how metal detectors are made, Tiffany reproductions and how aircraft engines are manufactured.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Twin vs. Twin
programme.desc: Identical twins Ron and Tron find solace with one another in their big family. Even though they have physical limitations due to medical issues, both are able to live fruitful lives. Ron is even able to find a blossoming love that soon turns deadly.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mother of Evil
programme.desc: For identical twins Mark and Martin Stephens, life in a family of twins has been anything but normal. But one of them is more unusual than the others. And before long, someone close will learn just how deadly a lifetime of unrealized dreams can be.

programme.title: Evil Twins: All-American Killers
programme.desc: Identical twins Roman and Ruslan Glukhoy are high school wrestling champions with a bright future in professional sports. But when a freak accident shatters their dreams, they follow a path to death and destruction with blood on their hands.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: In Kerrville, Texas, a long-simmering family feud takes a deadly turn when suspicions and tempers take over. It's a decades-long drama with a shocking ending that nobody sees coming.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Letter
programme.desc: A mysterious letter surfaces and contains a shocking twist in a homicide investigation. An entire family is impacted by the bombshell police uncover.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Stephanie Santerre goes missing, everyone in her life falls under scrutiny. An emerging web of lies and deception leaves investigators to puzzle out the sordid truth.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Dead Ringers
programme.desc: The Beck twins spend their entire lives side by side in the same house, until the day one of them decides that she's had enough.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: In Kerrville, Texas, a long-simmering family feud takes a deadly turn when suspicions and tempers take over. It's a decades-long drama with a shocking ending that nobody sees coming.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Letter
programme.desc: A mysterious letter surfaces and contains a shocking twist in a homicide investigation. An entire family is impacted by the bombshell police uncover.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Stephanie Santerre goes missing, everyone in her life falls under scrutiny. An emerging web of lies and deception leaves investigators to puzzle out the sordid truth.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Murder Has Two Faces
programme.desc: When her husband cuts her off financially, Diane Hart turns to her older sister for help. Together, the sisters come up with a deadly plan to get at the money Diane feels she deserves.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Words
programme.desc: Logan Schiendelman vanishes, and authorities find his car abandoned. Multiple tips claim seeing Logan, but searches turn up nothing. With no evidence of foul play, questions surface and police are forced to examine his family's controversial past.

programme.title: Disappeared: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: While on a Caribbean cruise, 23-year old Amy Bradley vanishes from her family's cabin and is never seen again. Over a decades-long struggle, her family embarks on countless grueling searches, stopping at nothing, they say, to find their beloved Amy.

programme.title: Disappeared: About a Boy
programme.desc: Eight year old Zachary Bernhardt disappears from his Florida home late at night. Suspicions swirl around his mom, but she denies any involvement and moves away. When another boy goes missing, new theories emerge.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Malcolm and Lindy Robertson leave their family behind to sail the open seas of retirement together. Lindy eventually learns to love Malcolm's dream of sailing to Thailand but paradise soon turns into an unfathomable nightmare.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Hijacked
programme.desc: Kelley Branam's husband Jake is a Miami charter boat captain with high aspirations. Jake works long hours to support his new family but Kelley's suspicions run deep. Out of the blue, she decides to join Jake on a charter and is never heard from again.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Last Breath
programme.desc: Living near Lake Minnetonka, MN with his wife and daughter, Jeff Skelton thinks his life is perfect until rumors of infidelity surface. Everyone has their breaking point. Jeff will do whatever it takes to keep his family from being pulled apart.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Cursed Paradise
programme.desc: Two couples arrive on the same remote island in the Pacific looking for paradise. Soon, all that either of them finds is trouble. When one couple emerges months later, the FBI will spend years deciphering exactly what happened.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific
programme.desc: Serena Karlan leaves everything she knows behind to join her boyfriend, retired NBA champion Bison Dele, aboard his catamaran in the South Pacific. Serena is the happiest she's ever been, until Dele's estranged brother surfaces and throws them off course.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Horror I Don't Remember
programme.desc: Sherry Shafer never had a good relationship with her younger brother, Brian Britton, but she never expected to lose everything because of him. Today, all she has left is the fear that one day he will return to finish what he started 26 years ago.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Is Different About Robbie
programme.desc: Though Ronald Hawkins and Candace Sims knew that their son Robbie was different from an early age, they were unprepared for the violent act that Robbie would commit, a crime that shook the nation. Now they talk about it all on camera.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Meyer Lansky
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, let alone find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Meyer Lansky

programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Changing of the Guard's Camp
programme.desc: Recently Jeff and his wife Leah inherited the cabin he grew up in from his mother but it has been dormant for nearly 10 years and needs some major repairs and upgrades.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Budget Bungalow
programme.desc: Michael sees potential in what once was a Victorian bungalow that has been eaten away by termites leaving catastrophic damage.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Cake on Every Plate: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2003 and reinvents the cake that so many folks complained about way back when. This time, the cake isn't just good: it's golden.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Icing Man Cometh
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' this episode from season six with two new buttercreams, including one curious model flavored with buttermilk.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian vs. Sawyer
programme.desc: Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian faces off against Challenger Jonathon Sawyer.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Staib
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Walter Staib is a German-trained chef with a passion for food history who challenges Iron Chef Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Halloween Scary Combinations
programme.desc: Iron Chefs Geoffrey Zakarian and Alex Guarnaschelli face off against chefs Spike Mendelsohn and Marcel Vigneron in this spooky trick-or-treat battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Tio
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon faces off against Challenger Chef Celina Tio. Chef Tio participated in the third season of The Next Iron Chef, for which Iron Chef Symon was a judge. Judges are Anthony Anderson, Karine Bakhoum and Michael Ruhlman.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Pasternack
programme.desc: Fish master Chef Pasternak challenged Iron Chef Morimoto.

programme.desc: Chefs Marc Forgione and Lee Anne Wong face-off in this Halloween themed episode.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Pies
programme.desc: Visit innovative bakers who decide to turn the pie world upside down.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Seattle Sweets
programme.desc: At Rodeo Donut, small-batch brioche doughnuts wake your taste buds up with the perfect mix of spicy and sweet. At Amandine Bakeshop, you get a taste of France.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Imagination
programme.desc: Life's too short for boring desserts, so we're sinking our teeth into some of the country's most imaginative sweets. Moojo is helping keep Austin weird and oh so delicious with customized ice cream sandwiches made with warm cookies.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Desert Desserts
programme.desc: Head to the Arizona desert to find some of the coolest desserts. At Fluff It Marshmallows in Gilbert, they're all about magnificent marshmallow and flavor possibilities.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Spins In Austin
programme.desc: In Austin, we find a unique spin on sweet treats at every turn. Sugar Mama's Bakeshop serves up sweet surprises like old-fashioned chocolate malted milkshake cupcakes and shortbread unicorns with edible glitter.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Treats in NYC
programme.desc: We're on the hunt for the best sweet treats New York City has to offer. Sweets by Chloe is a cute vegan bakeshop that's creating giant cookies and fudge cakes that are rich and moist, creamy and chocolatey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Things start heating up when Tyler Florence, Ted Allen, Ina Garten, The Neelys and others share their best ever hot and spicy dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: On the menu is a 24 layer chocolate cake and succulent duck smothered in gravy and cheese.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: El Paso
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, where Texas meets Mexico on the border as well as in the kitchen. The city is filled to the brim of its 10-gallon hat with Tex-Mex cuisine as well as Mexican classics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.desc: Donnie's newly built Turtle Tank goes missing. In order to get a birthday gift for Splinter, the Turtles have to take on thuggish Times Square Mascots.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Left in the Dark/ Get the Message
programme.desc: Lincoln races his siblings to the couch in order to watch his favourite TV show. Lincoln must delete an angry voicemail from Lori's phone so she doesn't hear it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Project Loud House/ In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln must help his sisters get ready faster so they don't miss the bus. Lincoln ends up being the swing vote on where family vacation takes place.

programme.title: The Loud House: Driving Miss Hazy/ No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their babysitter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job for the jellyfish; Bob is convinced that it's Opposite Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hall Monitor/ Jellyfish Jam
programme.desc: SpongeBob is the hall monitor at boating school; Bob takes a jellyfish home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Help Wanted/ Reef Blowers/ Tea at the Treedome
programme.desc: Bob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; meeting Sandy for tea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Revenge of the Triceratons
programme.desc: Donatello is feeling inferior to Fugitoid, but his intellect is put to the test when the Triceratons attack.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil of Dregg
programme.desc: When Raph loses his fighting mojo, he must overcome his feelings to save his brothers from certain doom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Ever-Burning Fire
programme.desc: The team must overcome impossible odds to acquire the final Black Hole Generator piece.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Earth's Last Stand
programme.desc: As the team finally reaches Earth, Fugitoid reveals a horrible secret about his past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: City at War
programme.desc: When April graduates to full Kunoichi, she faces a deadly new enemy, while the Turtles face the return of some old, dangerous foes.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Broken Foot
programme.desc: When Leonardo secretly allies himself with Kara, he gets himself into deeper danger than he could have realized.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Insecta Trifecta
programme.desc: The team faces Stockman-Fly's new insect minions, and Raph has to man up to overcome his fear of insects and lead the team.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Gangland
programme.desc: Don Vizioso's gang tracks the Turtles with a slew of Anti-Mutant weapons.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: House Pest
programme.desc: When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Across the Universe/ Brit's Picks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences; Brittany's furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Rose by Any Other Name/ Queen Bee
programme.desc: Simon's experiment of how plants respond to positive or negative feedback creates a monster, and it is growing. Brittany's fear of bees turns into admiration when she's shrunk down to their size and experiences life as a bee.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crocker Shocker/ Super Zero
programme.desc: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies; Cosmo becomes a superhero.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Catman Meets the Crimson Chin/ Genie Menie Minie Mo
programme.desc: The superhero TV show, 'Catman,' may be out of production, but its star, TV's Adam West will never rest as long as there are crimes to avenge. Timmy accidentally releases a Genie from a magic lava lamp.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Escape From Unwish Island/ The Gland Plan
programme.desc: Timmy's unwished wishes come back for revenge; Cosmo might lose his job as godparent.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Farm Pit/ Crock Talk

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Beach Blanket Bozos/ Poltergeeks
programme.desc: Dad admits he dropped out of school in grade 5 and joins Timmy's class.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Blue Detective

programme.title: The Thundermans: It's Not What You Link
programme.desc: Phoebe comes up with a plan to help Max and Link become friends. When Link ends up spending more time with Max than her, Phoebe thinks her plan was too good.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Call of Lunch Duty

programme.desc: Overworked bakery owner is already overwhelmed when her boyfriend sudden breaks up with her, she finds her Christmas spirit when a handsome solider appears.

programme.desc: A runaway child rekindles a couple's love when it is all but over.

programme.title: Movie: Finding Mrs. Claus

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Proposal
programme.desc: A lawyer second-guesses his proposals to both his job and his fiancé while rekindling his love for an old flame.

programme.title: Movie: Snowed-Inn Christmas
programme.desc: Polar-opposite publicists are forced to spend Christmas together in Santa Claus, Indiana while writing a story. The focus of their story shifts after learning the historic town is in trouble, so they must put aside their differences and work together.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Chasing Caribou
programme.desc: Jane heads to the Arctic Circle hoping to bag a caribou before winter. Atz Sr. and Atz Lee butcher their island cows and haul the meat back home. Meanwhile, Otto, Eivin, Charlotte and August wrap up the season's final cattle drive.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Alaska: Ten Years on the Homestead
programme.desc: The Kilchers look back on the last decade of their lives homesteading in the Alaskan wilderness. From their first moments on camera to never-before-seen footage, the family relives 10 years of danger, adventure and ingenuity on the last frontier.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Alaska: Ten Years on the Homestead
programme.desc: The Kilchers relive their first moments on camera and reveal never-before-seen footage from their last decade of homestead living.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Father-Son Ingenuity
programme.desc: Before the spring thaw floods the area, Atz Sr. and his sons build a bridge across a river using chainsaws and fallen logs. Otto and Eivin create two amphibious crafts from their ATVs. Meanwhile, Atz Lee and Jane build a new smokehouse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Days Are A-Comin'
programme.desc: With only two weeks left to finish their ambitious self-rescue, Marty races to complete the walls of the log cabin. Misty expands the garden and builds a goat shelter, while Matt takes the next generation on a hunt for gold.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Spring Delicacy
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane climb reefs to hunt for octopus. Jane must face her fear of heights or be trapped by the tide. Otto struggles to keep a newborn calf alive during the annual spring cattle drive. Eve gives Eivin news that will change the homestead forever.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Stung by a '67 Corvette Stingray

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferocious Ford and Fast Ferrari

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dodge Hodge Podge Part 1/ '65 Mustang
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron pick up a '64 Dodge Sweptline that's a mishmash of parts. A '32 Ford Roadster Richard forgot he bought rolls in, but it's up to Christie to seal the deal with the prospective buyer. KC hits the road with Richard to buy a '65 Mustang.

programme.desc: The crew struggles to finish the '64 Dodge truck. Richard flips a '52 Chevy. He digs out an Oldsmobile Delta '88 he forgot he bought, but it's also not quite what he remembered. Broken brakes leave a dent in the garage door and Richard's wallet.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dale Jr.'s Sick Nomad

programme.desc: DNA found on a marijuana joint in Florida in 2005 helps to solve the 1988 rape and murder of a California woman. A cold case murder in Illinois heats up when a jailhouse lawyer turns into a jailhouse snitch.

programme.desc: A family torn apart by their grandparents' murders. Two decades later, a cold case detective takes on the case that's haunted him since he was a child. When he breaks the case, he must race to solve it before the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.desc: New Orleans Detective Ryan Vaught takes on his most challenging case yet when a young married couple goes missing and one of them is found floating in a river, drowned to death.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: Summer Body

programme.title: Botched: Four Leeches and a Funeral

programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.
