programme.title: Paranormal 911: Home Intruder/ Firewoman/ Dead Man's Curve
programme.desc: A late night three alarm house fire forces a terrified family out of their home, but Firefighter/ EMT Chris Sanders thinks he sees someone still stuck inside.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Campus Cult and Eye Contact
programme.desc: A campus police officer and her partner investigate an emergency in the parking lot next to a condemned building, and a firefighter is called to a crash involving a car that he just witnessed pass him.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Scarred, War House Haunting and Winged Demon
programme.desc: An EMT has a close encounter with the spirit of a car crash victim, a shadowy entity stalks a police officer and her partner while they investigate an abandoned home and a paramedic witnesses a patient's horrific transformation.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Coffin Corridor
programme.desc: A firefighter experiences ghostly phenomena at a popular amusement park. A police officer encounters a dark entity that may be the cause of multiple fatalities on a notoriously dangerous stretch of highway known as the 'Coffin Corridor.'

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Paranormal Prisoner
programme.desc: A correctional officer witnesses the Grim Reaper collect the soul of a dead prisoner, the ghost of teenage girl attaches herself to the EMT who tried to save her and an elderly man is saved by his recently deceased wife.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Martin/ He Made Me Do It/ Dark Spirit
programme.desc: A prison guard witnesses a terrifying encounter between an inmate and her dead brother, a paramedic is confronted by the ghost of an elderly patient's past and a state trooper comes face-to-face with a remorseful spirit.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: The Voice
programme.desc: An EMT responds to a call in a home that contains a creepy collection of mannequins, a first responder questions her sanity after hearing the voice of a dead woman and a police officer investigates strange goings-on in an elderly woman's attic.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Fearful Fed
programme.desc: A Homeland Security officer is left shaken by an encounter with an otherworldly intruder inside an empty government building, a mysterious soldier saves a hospital corpsman's life during a hurricane and paramedics respond to a ghostly 911 call.

programme.title: Paranormal 911: Through the Looking Glass
programme.desc: An officer investigates a mysterious disturbance at a family gathering, a dark presence hitches a ride in a police car after a shooting and a paramedic hears a ghostly argument while answering a call at a recently diseased woman's home.

programme.title: Below Deck: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: Frustrations mount for Rocky over her job and Eddie. Meanwhile, Ben wows charter guests with a steakhouse-style dinner, yet his breakfast dishes fail to measure up, and Rocky divulges details about a secret affair.

programme.title: Below Deck: Loose Lips Sink Ships
programme.desc: The final dinner of the charter season is imperiled when Ben suffers a severe injury and he’s forced to rely on Rocky for help. Captain Lee talks to Connie about her yachting future, and the crew's bonfire gets extremely tense.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Taxing Times and Blurry Lines
programme.desc: Karen invites Gizelle and Ashley to her homecoming in Virginia, but an emotional visit to her childhood farm shows the ladies a different side of the Grande Dame. Robyn's tax woes go public. Candiace considers legal action against Monique.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: 512: Behind The Episode
programme.desc: Follow the upscale lives of six intriguing, well-to-do women in Potomac, Maryland.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: No Shows and Show Downs
programme.desc: Monique invites the ladies to her podcast, but their lack of support leaves her feeling even more isolated. Juan asks Robyn's parents for their blessing to remarry their daughter. Meanwhile, Gizelle and Jamal continue to struggle with their relationship.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: No Shows and Show Downs
programme.desc: Monique invites the ladies to her podcast, but their lack of support leaves her feeling even more isolated. Juan asks Robyn's parents for their blessing to remarry their daughter. Meanwhile, Gizelle and Jamal continue to struggle with their relationship.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: A Country Ghost Town Jamboree
programme.desc: Hold on to your wigs as the Biermanns come face to face with ghouls and ghosts in the most haunted house in the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live
programme.desc: Andy Cohen sits down with guests from Bravo's series as well as the entertainment world.

programme.title: Bravo's Chat Room
programme.desc: Bravo's most opinionated women discuss the biggest headlines in pop culture.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kelly covers 'Watermelon Sugar' by Harry Styles. Plus, Tiana Major9 stops by for a chat and a performance.

programme.title: Below Deck: Shut Your Porthole!
programme.desc: Tempers flare on deck as the crew prepares for their first group of charter guests, a larger-than-life group of fun-loving Southerners. A rowdy, randy charter guest wants to get very friendly with new deckhand, Andrew. Kelley and Jennice get flirty.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hex on the Beach
programme.desc: Kate goes increasingly unhappy with Kat's bad attitude and constant complaining. Meanwhile, Andrew hopes to make amends for his mistakes by giving the female guests a special performance on the sky deck. A frightening accident brings the night to a halt.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mojitos Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Kate is annoyed by the new charter guests and their ongoing demands for special attention. Andrew makes a stunning admission to Captain Lee that affects the entire crew. Ben gives a hands-on cooking lesson to his flirty female guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Charter Guest Soulmate
programme.desc: With some of his crew furious about the distribution of tip money, Captain Lee has to make a decision about how to handle Andrew. Also, Kate is excited about a new charter guest who has very specific requests, but is stunned by an unexpected critique.

programme.title: Below Deck: Bitchy Resting Face
programme.desc: The Ohana crew struggles to pull of an elaborate and elegant 'White Party.' They worry that the combined fury of an angry Mother Nature and an angrier Kate may ruin everything.

programme.title: Below Deck: Strains, Stains and a Big Pain
programme.desc: A night of fun turns sour when Kelly confronts some fellow yachties who insult Amy and Jennice. Ben and Kate struggle to accommodate a returning charter guest and her outspoken, rambunctious family. Kat is blindsided by a surprise visit.

programme.title: Below Deck: She'd Better Not Be Staying
programme.desc: The Ohana crew is very unhappy to learn that Adrienne will be coming onboard as a guest. When Adrienne blows the lid off the lingering tension between Kat and Amy, the boat erupts in total chaos. Meanwhile, Amy feels isolated.

programme.title: Below Deck: New Kid on the Deck
programme.desc: Everybody is happy when the new deckhand, Logan Reese, finally arrives - and once the stews size him up, the fight for his attention is on. Amy has to call for back-up when she’s left alone on late-night service with a throng of hard-partying guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: You're Grounded
programme.desc: After a night of partying, the Ohana crew has to prepare for a new group of charter guests, but simmering tensions between Amy and Kate and a lingering hangover for Kelley complicate everything. Kelley receives a harsh reprimand from Captain Lee.

programme.title: Below Deck: Premature Corkulation
programme.desc: Kelley asks Jennice out on a date, but it doesn’t exactly go according to plan. Meanwhile, the new charter guests turn the Ohana sky deck into a stock trading floor and Logan turns on the charm towards the primary guest’s model girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Dry Land, Damp Eyes
programme.desc: Tensions within 'Ohana's' crew reach their boiling point as they prepare for the season's final charter. Dean, the recipient of Kate's infamous 'penis blanket' fury, returns as a guest. After returning to port, the crew say their final goodbyes.

programme.title: Movie: The First Purge
programme.desc: In an attempt to reduce the crime rate, the American government makes all crimes legal for 12 hours in a small city to let people purge their more violent urges, but when the oppressed people become targets they fight back and the violence spreads.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: After the queen bee of a college sorority is murdered on her birthday, she wakes up again that same morning and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. Determined to break the cycle, she tries to figure out who keeps killing her.

programme.title: Movie: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family of four living in an isolated farmhouse must remain absolutely silent because of the deadly monsters that hunt using sound that live all around them, but with a new baby on the way that perpetual and safe silence may soon be shattered.

programme.title: American Pickers: Captain Quirk
programme.desc: Frank and Dave's road trip through Florida gets stranger at every turn, from a creepy collection of kitsch to a tugboat that's home to a captain and his unusual pet. Back in Iowa, Mike readies the new shop for its Grand Opening.

programme.title: American Pickers: Something Weird Here

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Strike, Spare, BOOM
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars meet a guy who is selling his homemade mortar that fires a very unique brand of ammo- bowling balls.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pedal to the Metal
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars meet a man with a handwritten poem from rock legend Jimi Hendrix. The guys are presented with a chessboard made from the wood of one of the most famous ships in history: the Titanic.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Offer
programme.desc: The guys check out a 1956 Chevy drag racing car. When someone brings in a historic magician's box, the guys learn that cutting Chumlee in half is the easiest part.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silent But Chumlee
programme.desc: Chumlee is on the hunt for deals when he checks out a Silent Scope sniper arcade game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn U
programme.desc: A first edition of Mark Twain's 'A Yankee in King Arthur's Court' is brought into the shop. Then, a 1953 Peter Pan animation flies into the shop. Later, Rick takes his business expertise to the classroom.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Who's Your Dali?
programme.desc: A painting from Salvador Dali's Divine Comedy series ascends into the shop. Then, Rick faces an uphill battle when a note signed by Edmund Hillary treks in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Get in the Ring
programme.desc: Memorabilia from undefeated boxing champ Rocky Marciano shows up at the shop. Then, Rick checks out a one-of-a-kind, battery-operated, glow-in-the-dark car. Later, Chumlee uses modern technology to 'tele-presence' into work.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Put Up Your Nukes
programme.desc: A seller claims he has a cover for a thermonuclear warhead. Then, Corey swings into action when a mandolin from Bob Wills' Texas Playboys comes into the shop. Later, Chumlee tries to find something he's better at than Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tricky Ricky
programme.desc: Go long with the Pawn Stars when a signed jersey from San Diego Chargers quarterback Dan Fouts gets thrown into the shop. Then, Rick tries to learn the trick of the trade when Harry Blackstone's vanishing birdcage appears.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dodging Dillinger
programme.desc: Bullet shells from John Dillinger's last robbery are brought in to the shop. Then, Rick and Corey try to make a drive-by deal on a vintage Schwinn Whizzer from 1947. Later, Chumlee relives his childhood when a customer brings in a Stretch Armstrong doll.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pinball Punch
programme.desc: Chumlee checks out two classic pinball machines. Then, Rick wings it when he checks out a carrier pigeon capsule from WWII. Later, the guys give Rick a hard time when he decides to take up boxing.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Van Gogh a Go Go
programme.desc: A customer brings in lithographs that are believed to have belonged to Vincent van Gogh. Then, Corey and Chumlee are brought back to their younger days when a vintage skateboard collection comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Book of Rick
programme.desc: A guitar pedal that was once used by Kurt Cobain is brought into the shop. Then, a copy of the Book of Mormon from 1842 arrives and could possibly be the most expensive book to ever be in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Behind the Wheel
programme.desc: A 1923 Babe Ruth baseball card arrives at the shop as well as an unrestored children's tricycle from the 1930s. Later, Corey totals his truck and is forced to drive the company car with Rick's face on it.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: G.I. Pawn
programme.desc: Two rare G.I. Joe playsets, a 1950s Chinese military motorcycle, a photograph and letter signed by poet Henry Wadsworth Longfellow, and an antique Black and Decker drill.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silver Stash Pawn
programme.desc: A first edition of the Adventures of Bob Hope comic; an ancient Egyptian mummy mask; a 1950s Disney fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Napoleon Complex
programme.desc: A letter signed by Napoleon, a surreal Pedro Friedeberg figure, a 1960s Monkees talking puppet, and some original 'Dick & Jane' illustrations.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Triple Axel Pawn
programme.desc: Jam out with the Pawn Stars when a custom Fender quad guitar rocks into the shop. Then, a Wheaties box featuring Tonya Harding skates in. Rick feels the weight of it all when he checks out two steelyard scales from the 1700s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spider Pawn
programme.desc: Rick looks into the authenticity of a rare 1936 Zippo prototype. Corey's wants to snag an antique rotary phone for the right price. Chumlee meets Marvel Comics creator and legendary writer Stan Lee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Up, Up and Away
programme.desc: An original Superman costume catches Rick and Corey's attention. Rick wants to fetch a good price for a retro computer, while Corey determines the value of two vintage music posters. Chumlee tries to get a good deal for a 1980s Rhodes piano.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Helgaween-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Haunt-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Maddie and Willow prepare for 'Senior Scare,' a Ridgewood tradition where the high school seniors scare the middle schoolers. Meanwhile, when Joey and Liv are at the Central Park Spooktacular, Liv falls into a precarious predicament with a photographer.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Scare-a-Rooney
programme.desc: When Parker and Joey learn that the students at their new school, BOOMS, don't celebrate Halloween, they make it their mission to show them how much fun it can be.

programme.title: Disney Channel Halloween House Party
programme.desc: Disney Channel fan-favourite stars take on a variety of zany characters and spooktacular spoofs in this sketch comedy show. Filmed remotely and hosted by Tobie Windham ('Just Roll With It'), the cast transforms themselves and their homes.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Creepin' It Real
programme.desc: When Booker has a haunting vision on Halloween involving their new neighbor, the kids set out to prove the guy is really a monster.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Don't Trust the G in Apartment 4B
programme.desc: Now that they are high school students, Booker and Nia feel they are too old for trick-or-treating. They instead convince Levi, Tess and Ramon to join them for a night of real scares and fun in 4B, the apartment that is suspected to be haunted.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Aliens Among Us
programme.desc: After watching a documentary series about aliens, Blair becomes convinced that the family's new neighbors are from a different planet and enlists Owen's help to find evidence to prove it.

programme.title: Disney Fam Jam: Trick or Treat Yo Self

programme.title: Jessie: The Runaway Bride of Frankenstein

programme.title: Jessie: The Ghostess With the Mostest
programme.desc: Jessie makes the Ross kids bring Stuart along for trick-or-treating and he tells them a haunting story about a ghost who is out to get them. One by one, the kids mysteriously disappear. Then, Jessie attends a masquerade party and meets a mysterious boy.

programme.title: Stuck in the Middle: Stuck in a Merry Scary

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: Halloween

programme.title: Girl Meets World: Girl Meets World of Terror 2

programme.title: Girl Meets World: Girl Meets World of Terror 3

programme.desc: When Booker and Levi want expensive virtual reality goggles, the boys come up with a plan to make money by selling snacks at school.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Curse of Death Island
programme.desc: A team of expert archaeologists are hot on the trail of the legendary Viking utopia of the Americas, and clues from the ancient Sagas lead them to a mysterious, hostile island with a deadly past.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: The Alaska Enigma
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that the Vikings of North America didn't just disappear, but might have traveled further into American than anyone ever imagined, and using the latest tech, experts put this shocking theory to the test.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Resurrecting Notre Dame
programme.desc: When catastrophic fires ravaged Notre-Dame in April 2019, one of the world's great wonders was left in ruins. Experts use the latest technology and modern-day science to reveal what it would take to rebuild it a second time.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Doomsday in Venice
programme.desc: Venice is a city in crisis and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. As apocalyptic floodwaters unleash havoc, experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets at the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is one of the world's greatest engineering marvels, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Fortress of the Gods
programme.desc: Rome's Pantheon hides the secret to the Roman Empire's power, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Rise of the Aqueducts
programme.desc: Rome's aqueducts are one of the greatest engineering marvels in history, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build them. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building them a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: One of His Women
programme.desc: To the outside world, Aswad Ayinde was a hit music video director. But to his daughter, Aziza Ayinde Kibbibi, he was a repulsive monster who did horrifying things in God's name. After years of suffering, she finally escaped to reveal the truth about him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secrets
programme.desc: Sean Lewis isn't surprised to hear his brother, Patrick, has been arrested again. But this time, Sean learns that every time he had helped his brother get out of some jam he was unwittingly helping a monster continue living a secret double life.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Found Them in Storage
programme.desc: When Wilda Gadd married with Howard Willis, she dismissed the rumors about him. Not until she found herself wearing a wire and risking her life to find dismembered bodies did she finally realize the truth: Howard's secret life was darker than any rumor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Murder of Haley Anderson
programme.desc: When a young nursing student at Binghamton University in New York went missing, her roommates used the app Find My Friends to track her down. What the app led them to launched an international manhunt for her killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Found Them in Storage
programme.desc: When Wilda Gadd married with Howard Willis, she dismissed the rumors about him. Not until she found herself wearing a wire and risking her life to find dismembered bodies did she finally realize the truth: Howard's secret life was darker than any rumor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Murder of Haley Anderson
programme.desc: When a young nursing student at Binghamton University in New York went missing, her roommates used the app Find My Friends to track her down. What the app led them to launched an international manhunt for her killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: One of His Women
programme.desc: To the outside world, Aswad Ayinde was a hit music video director. But to his daughter, Aziza Ayinde Kibbibi, he was a repulsive monster who did horrifying things in God's name. After years of suffering, she finally escaped to reveal the truth about him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: On the Run
programme.desc: When Susan Hamlin walks into a police station to confess that she is part of a satanic cult and plans to murder her husband, no one could guess that the truth is even more bizarre and sinister, or that it is all part of her own desperate escape plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Trapped in Hell
programme.desc: Lindsay Wrinkles always knew that her father had a short temper, but she never expected to be on the run from him when she was only 14. As she runs from hideout to hideout desperate to evade him, Lindsay wonders what will happen if he ever finds her.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Unfinished Journey
programme.desc: A young woman about to start a Hollywood career mysteriously disappears off Interstate 10.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Coralville
programme.desc: A young woman is found shot to death off the side of a dirt road. Police hope their best clue, the bullet found at the scene, will unmask her killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Unholy Affair
programme.desc: Life for Syble and Earnie revolves around two things: church and family, but a freak accident and wandering eyes throw the marriage off-kilter, and threatens to drive this couple into an unholy trinity of betrayal, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Country Killer
programme.desc: Rodeo start Matt Allen finds southern comfort in the arms of country girl Elsie Wells. Until she finds his best friend-and they all discover a thick gumbo of trouble.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deceitful Secrets
programme.desc: Cecil and Larlane Brown have been together for years. But their secrets and lies, ignored and neglected for decades, threaten to turn their 50-year relationship into a bloody battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Flirting With Murder
programme.desc: When Trichele and Brian promise to stick it out for better or for worse, they have no idea how 'worse' things will get. Their passionate love easily flips to bitter hate when the parties, drinking, and recriminations escalate until one of them is dead.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Gambling With The Devil
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her car by her husband and son.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: An investigation on the murder of a mother focuses on her violent husband until a jailhouse snitch reveals new information.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Lust for Murder
programme.desc: When Stacie Smith is found dead and an accusation that she has been unfaithful is written on the wall of the crime scene, police believe that a jealous lover is behind her brutal death. But that might just be a ploy to frame the wrong man for the crime.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Wangler and his wife Kathy appear to be living the middle-class dream: two sons, financial security, and a strong faith. But on September 4th, 2006, their façade falls down around them as a cold pre-meditated execution tears their family apart.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Courage Under Fire
programme.desc: Four stories of courage under fire; a symbol of luck saves Marines in Korea; a handheld weapon protects Europe during the Cold War; an instrument sends a ship off to its depths and a letter helps write victory during the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Smoking Guns
programme.desc: A classic western gunfight, a battle between a US naval patrol and a German U-Boat, a stagecoach bandit hell bent on revenge and a revolutionary tactic that turned the course of a war.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Four different stories that of events that happened against all odds.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a Train Caboose into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Hosts Mike and Robert salvage conductor chairs from a train caboose. The whole crew then picks through the Old Cold Storage warehouse in Arrington, VA. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay work together to build a large iron table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: North Carolina Pick and Haul

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Barnesville House

programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Little Chef Diner
programme.desc: The Dawgs stay in Roanoke to salvage an old diner sign. The crew also picks through a huge warehouse in Greensboro, NC. Back at the shop, the Whiteside family works together to build a clock from road signs.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reel Theatres
programme.desc: The crew salvages a movie theater, and find analog projectors, neon letters and more.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Robeson County Jail
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the Dawgs salvage a 1950s jail in Lumberton, NC. Key items include a holding cell, sinks, and slate countertops. At the shop, Mike and Tay build a bar from bowling alley flooring.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Fire Station #1
programme.desc: Robert takes the Dawgs downtown to salvage a historic firehouse that is being transformed into a restaurant and brewery. Later, Mike and Tay visit an antique shop in hopes of picking up some parts for a commission build.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Firehouse Number 7
programme.desc: Firefighters ask the Dawgs to salvage what they can from their old fire house, and the team works with them to incorporate the materials into a new facility. Then, the guys heads to Highpoint, NC, to fill up their trucks with international treasures.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Texas Transformation in Port Aransas
programme.desc: A woman and her kids have been vacationing in Port Aransas, TX, for years and are ready to own a piece of their favorite paradise.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Dining
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits two fall-tastic fairs for seasonal carnival treats. Fright Nights in West Palm Beach, Florida has some scarily delicious items.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bowls and Rolls

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dude, Where's My Carb?

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Orange is the New Snack

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
